tests.name: is correct for loop blocks

assertions.input:
@for (item of items.foo.bar; track item.id; let i = $index, _o_d_d_ = $odd) {

{{ item }}

}@empty {There were no items in the list.}
expected:
@for (item of items.foo.bar; track item.id; let i = $index, _o_d_d_ = $odd) {

{{ item }}

}@empty {There were no items in the list.}
@for (item of items.foo.bar; track item.id; let i = $index, _o_d_d_ = $odd) {
@empty {There were no items in the list.}
There were no items in the list.

tests.name: is correct for if blocks

assertions.input: @if (cond.expr; as foo) {Main case was true!}@else if (other.expr) {Extra case was true!}@else {False case!}
expected: @if (cond.expr; as foo) {Main case was true!}@else if (other.expr) {Extra case was true!}@else {False case!}
